title: (Bullish Signal) GTII, $4.35) was a top quarterly gainer, rising +4250%. Expect an Uptrend continuation
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Global Tech Industries Group (GTII, $4.35) was one of top quarterly gainers, jumping +4250% to $4.35 per share. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor analyzed 1098 stocks in the Financial Conglomerates Industry over the last three months, and discovered that 283 of them (25.79%) charted an Uptrend while 815 of them (74.21%) trended down. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 401 similar cases when GTII's price jumped over 15% within three months. In 212 out of those 401 cases, GTII's price went up during the following month. Based on these historical data, A.I. thinks the odds of an Uptrend continuation for GTII are 53%. Throughout the month of 02/25/21 - 03/29/21, the price experienced a +235% Uptrend. During the week of 03/22/21 - 03/29/21, the stock enjoyed a +235% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/dvg1uyhyp6q61.png?width=1534&format=png&auto=webp&s=ca5778c0237cad629cbc8274700a28a80585c8ac

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 17, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on GTII as a result. Tikeron A.I. detected that in 126 of 155 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

Following a +85.11% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where GTII advanced for three days, in 104 of 132 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 79%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tikeron A.I. detected that in 37 of 59 cases where GTII Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 63%.
